description: A holiday-themed graphic with a red banner at the top reading 'LIMITED TIME OFFER'. White text on the left reads 'UNTIL THE END OF THE YEAR, TAKE ADVANTAGE OF A $3,000 BONUS TO HEAD HOME FOR THE HOLIDAYS!'. The right side shows a hand holding a phone displaying an app, in front of a decorated Christmas tree and a window. Small text at the bottom references checking names off a list.
notable_text: LIMITED TIME OFFER; TAKE ADVANTAGE OF A $3,000 BONUS TO HEAD HOME FOR THE HOLIDAYS!
